attributes.title: 📋 Timesketch Pivot — Side panel
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — 📋 Timesketch Pivot — Side panel
HOST: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=hostname%3AWIN-MASTER01
USER: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=user%3Aanalyst
IP: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2A203.0.113.44%2A
PROCESS: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2Aprocess.name%3Dexplorer.exe%2A%20OR%20message%3A%2Aexplorer.exe%2A
FILE: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2APrefetch%2A%20OR%20message%3A%2Adfir.mft%2A
IOC: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2Amalicious.example.com%2A%20OR%20tag%3Ati
CTI: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=tag%3AAPT%20OR%20tag%3AC2%20OR%20message%3A%2Amalicious.example.com%2A
ALERT: http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2Aevent.dataset%3Dsecurity.detection%2A%20OR%20tag%3Aalert

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — Host
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — Host
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=hostname%3AWIN-MASTER01
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-events',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'host.name:WIN-MASTER01'),sort:!())

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — User
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — User
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=user%3Aanalyst
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-events',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'user.name:analyst'),sort:!())

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — IP
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — IP
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2A203.0.113.44%2A
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-events',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'source.ip:203.0.113.44 OR destination.ip:203.0.113.44'),sort:!())

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — IOC
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — IOC
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2Amalicious.example.com%2A%20OR%20tag%3Ati
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-events',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'ti_match:true AND (ti.ioc_value:malicious.example.com OR ti_ioc_value:malicious.example.com OR message:*malicious.example.com*)'),sort:!())

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — Process
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — Process
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2Aprocess.name%3Dexplorer.exe%2A%20OR%20message%3A%2Aexplorer.exe%2A
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-events',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'process.name:explorer.exe OR process.command_line:*explorer.exe*'),sort:!())

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — File/DFIR
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — File/DFIR
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2APrefetch%2A%20OR%20message%3A%2Adfir.mft%2A
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-events',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'file.path:*Prefetch* OR message:*CMD.EXE*'),sort:!())

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — Alert
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — Alert
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=message%3A%2Aevent.dataset%3Dsecurity.detection%2A%20OR%20tag%3Aalert
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-events',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'event.dataset:"security.detection" OR _index:forensic-alerts*'),sort:!())

attributes.title: ⏭ Open in Timesketch — CTI
attributes.description:
Cross-Pivot FP — ⏭ Open in Timesketch — CTI
TIMESKETCH_URL=http://localhost:5000/sketch/2/explore/?q=tag%3AAPT%20OR%20tag%3AC2%20OR%20message%3A%2Amalicious.example.com%2A
OS_MIRROR=http://localhost:5601/dashboards/app/discover#/?_a=(columns:!(),filters:!(),index:'fp-ti-opencti',interval:auto,query:(language:kuery,query:'ti.ioc_value:malicious.example.com OR ti_match:true'),sort:!())
